model.name: LTX-2 2.3 EditAnything Ref V2V Distilled 1.0 22B
model.description: Experimental EditAnything reference video-to-video workflow for LTX-2.3 Distilled 1.0 22B. Faster 8-step preset using a source/control video plus one reference image, with the standard EditAnything LoRA and its sidecar reference module loaded together.

prompt: Add a middle-aged man with curly grey hair, a beard and glasses, wearing a blue quarter-zip sweater, on the right side of the frame, standing in front of a raw cut of meat on a tray.
